channel.title: Theatrical — Research Essays
channel.description: Research essays on cinema technology, developer ecosystems, and the $3.3B cinema API economy.

item.title: The Cinema Platform Thesis
item.description: Why cinema technology needs a developer ecosystem — and what it looks like when it gets one.

item.title: What Stripe Did for Payments
item.description: Draw the parallel: Stripe → payments :: Theatrical → cinema. A technical comparison with code examples.

item.title: Cinema as Protocol
item.description: Cinema-going as cultural infrastructure — why the ritual matters more than the technology.

item.title: The 3.3 Billion Dollar API
item.description: Vista Group processes $3.3B in annual GTV. The developer ecosystem around it is effectively zero.

item.title: Event-Driven Cinema
item.description: Why real-time events change everything for cinema operations — and how to build an event bridge when the platform API is request-response.
